notes: v1.8.4.79 - Cap nhat lon cho I2A Visual Asset Search + Fix thu vien Lib Co gi moi: - Tim kiem model, scene, HDRI bang hinh anh (keo tha .max .rar .zip .7z .hdr .exr vao I2A) - Smart Merge: tu dong relink texture khi merge model (ho tro V-Ray, Corona, 8 loai texture) - Cosmos Integration: tim 15,500+ asset Cosmos, import native 100% giong Cosmos Browser - Library Manager: quan ly thu vien da index (Ctrl+Click nut Add Library) - HDRI Pipeline: tonemap HDR/EXR, tim kiem, Apply HDRI to Scene (tu detect renderer) - Merge quota: Free 50 luot/ngay, Pro unlimited Sua loi: - Fix crash Library Manager khi ten folder chua ky tu dac biet - Fix indexing fail tren mot so may - Fix Cosmos import chon sai renderer - Fix hien thi

gay nham lan QUAN TRONG - Can cap nhat thu vien Python thu cong: Ban auto-update KHONG bao gom thu vien Python day du (qua nang). De I2A trich xuat thumbnail tu file .max, cac ban can tai them bo cai thu vien: Tai tai: [link Drive] Gom: update_site_packages.bat + site-packages.zip + 7z.exe + 7z.dll Chay file .bat, chon 1 (Max 2022-2025) hoac 2 (Max 2026+), xong khoi dong lai Max. Voi cac ban co ban quyen Pro: Lien he Admin de duoc ho tro cap nhat truc tiep. Voi cac ban khac: Neu muon sach se, co the tai ban cai day du tu Drive va chay Setup lai tu dau (da bao gom day du thu vien, khong can chay them gi).
